description: SQLite header tampering is detected: mismatched change counters emit ForensicWarning
steps: Construct a byte buffer with a valid SQLite header but where write_counter != read_counter
Assert ForensicWarning::SchemaVersionMismatch or a new HeaderTampered variant is returned

description: SQLite page size field is validated against actual file size
steps: Construct a byte buffer where declared page_size * page_count != file size
